interaction_phrase: a professor in Georgia Tech's School of Electrical and Computer Engineering
occurrence_sentence: The idea here is to generate a diversity of errors so you are not seeing the same error again and again, said Moinuddin Qureshi, a professor in Georgia Tech's School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, who worked with doctoral student, Swamit Tannu.

interaction_phrase: who worked with doctoral student, Swamit Tannu
occurrence_sentence: The idea here is to generate a diversity of errors so you are not seeing the same error again and again, said Moinuddin Qureshi, a professor in Georgia Tech's School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, who worked with doctoral student, Swamit Tannu.
Tannu said that choosing qubits with different error rates — and therefore different types of error — ensures that one correct answer will rise above the diversity of errors.
